home.subtitle: The LGBTQIA+ hub of Paris and France. Nightlife, safe places, Pride agenda, health resources, orgs, community.
home.manifesto_text: An independent, ad-free platform built by and for the LGBTQIA+ community. We document, we share, we protect.
home.pillar1_text: Bars, clubs, saunas, cabarets, queer bookstores, orgs, LGBT-friendly doctors, safe spaces. From Paris to Marseille, Lyon, Lille, Toulouse, Nantes and beyond.
home.pillar2_text: Full agenda of Pride marches, Existrans, queer festivals and themed nights all year long.
home.pillar3_text: PrEP, free testing, trained doctors, mental health support, transition resources. Verified, confidential directory.
home.pillar4_text: Forum, testimonials, mentoring, safe travel. Strict moderation, optional anonymity, GDPR compliant.
home.join_text: Subscribe to the newsletter, share your favorite places, submit an event, or just say hi.

footer.tagline: Independent LGBTQIA+ platform — Paris + all of France.

participate.title: Contribute to the community
participate.subtitle: Share a night-out photo, suggest a place, submit a Pride event, or share your story.
participate.drop_label: Drop your photo here or click to browse
participate.success_text: Your submission has been received. Our team reviews within 48h.

gallery.title: Community gallery
gallery.subtitle: Nights, marches, places, portraits. Each photo tells a story.

pride.title: Pride 365
pride.subtitle: Full agenda of Pride marches, queer festivals, alt marches and special Pride events across France.

soirees.title: Nightlife
soirees.subtitle: Clubs, drag shows, ballrooms, cabarets, tea dances. Queer Paris and France nights, every day.

lieux.title: Places
lieux.subtitle: Bars, clubs, saunas, cabarets, bookstores, orgs, safe spaces. Verified, community-driven directory.

identites.title: Identities & orientations
identites.subtitle: Educational glossary of gender identities and sexual orientations. Flags, resources, FAQ.
identites.intro: Nobody is required to define themselves. But if words help, here are some.

sante.title: Sexual & mental health
sante.subtitle: PrEP, free testing, LGBT-friendly doctors, mental health support, transition resources.

assos.title: LGBT+ organizations
assos.subtitle: Directory of LGBT+ orgs in France. Permanences, activities, mentoring, support.

agenda.title: Agenda
agenda.subtitle: All LGBT+ events: Pride, nights, workshops, talks, drop-ins, testing.

manifeste.title: Our manifesto
manifeste.subtitle: Why parislgbt + francelgbt exist.
manifeste.p1_text: No advertising. No investors. Community platform, funded by premium memberships and org partnerships.
manifeste.p2_text: All identities, all ages (16+), all regions. Lesbians, gays, bi, trans, non-binary, queer, ace, pan, intersex, allies welcome.
manifeste.p3_text: Pre-moderation on sensitive content. Zero tolerance for hate, racism, internalized LGBTphobia, transphobia, serophobia.
manifeste.p4_text: Code publicly available, GDPR-portable data, self-hostable. Community keeps control.
manifeste.p5_text: For rights, against hate. We document, we report, we relay associations. Partners with Inter-LGBT, SOS Homophobie, Centre LGBT Paris-IDF, Acceptess-T, AIDES.

tech.title: How it works
tech.subtitle: Open source platform in Next.js + PostgreSQL + Prisma. Self-hostable, GDPR-friendly.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: Once a week: best parties, new place, event alerts. No spam, 1-click unsubscribe.

about.title: About
about.intro: parislgbt and francelgbt are LGBTQIA+ community platforms. Independent, open source, ad-free.
